page_subtitle: Explore public JSON endpoints for health checks and OCR demo usage.
select_endpoint: Select an endpoint to view request and response details.
ocr_demo_subtitle: Upload a PDF, JPG, or PNG file. The page calls the public OCR API and renders recognized tokens by their x/y coordinates. OCR recognizes one page only; accuracy is not guaranteed for files with more than one page.
ocr_upload_hint: Choose a PDF, JPG, or PNG file. One page only.
ocr_preview_desc: Tokens are placed according to the x/y coordinates returned by the public API.
ocr_source_desc: The uploaded file preview appears here for side-by-side comparison.
ocr_empty_source: Choose a file to preview it here.
ocr_empty_preview: Upload a file and run OCR to see the coordinate preview.
